title: helictochloa levis
intro: Helictochloa levis, also known as alpine meadow-grass, is a type of flowering plant species native to the alpine regions of the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Helictochloa levis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including coughs, colds, and respiratory problems, thanks to its expectorant properties that help relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of Helictochloa levis include teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
